name: Pasta Green Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz) frozen cut green beans, thawed and drained
1 package (10 oz) frozen green peas, thawed and drained
1 cup Green pepper strips, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all the dressing ingredients.
2. Mix until well-blended; set aside.
3. If not serving immediately, cover and chill until ready to use.
4. Place the cooled rotini in a large bowl and toss with the remaining ingredients, except the dressing.
5. Cover and chill until ready to use.
6. Just before serving, mix the dressing again and toss into the salad.
